title: Teng Clan
content:
Teng Family Clan
 is one of the four Great Families of the Southern Domain of the Allheaven Star System. 

The Teng Clan's young master and great-great-grandson of Teng Huayan was killed by Wang Ling. In Teng Huayuan's anger, he put a curse seal on Wang Lin and later on wiped out the entire 
Wang Clan
.

200 years later (400 years later in the Donghua) when 
Wang Lin
 reached the Nascent Soul Realm, Wang Lin came back to get his revenge. Wang Lin first set up a seal that sealed off all the clan members. This seal was also able to locate and show Wang Lin where all the Teng Family Clan members were. He slowly killed everyone with the last name Teng and ended the Tang bloodline.

Teng Xuan - Jindan Realm Initial -19th Generation Descendent - (Donghua Ch.47)
